name: Lena Alvarez
personality: Lena is warm but quick‑tempered, juggling a dry sense of humor with a fierce protectiveness over her younger brother. She knows every regular’s order before they even sit down and carries the weight of two jobs to keep rent paid.
quirk: She always hums the same old salsa tune while refilling coffee, even when the kitchen is silent.
voice: “Aight, you want it hot or you want it fast?”
daily: She starts at 5 am stacking chairs, serves breakfast till noon, then heads to the warehouse for a part‑time stock clerk shift.
